title: Bournemouth midfielder Scott rejects new contract
summary: England international Alex Scott has rejected a new contract at Bournemouth amid interest from other Premier League clubs. The midfielder's decision signals potential movement in the transfer market as competition for his services intensifies.
content: Bournemouth midfielder Alex Scott rejects a new contract amid growing Premier League interest in the England international.

zh.title: 伯恩茅斯中场斯科特拒绝新合同
zh.summary: 英格兰国脚亚历克斯·斯科特拒绝了伯恩茅斯的新合同,此时其他英超俱乐部对他产生了兴趣。这位中场球员的决定预示着转会市场可能出现变动,对他服务的竞争也在加剧。

title: Tottenham sign France defender Sombath from Lyon
summary: Tottenham have completed the signing of France international Alice Sombath from Lyon for a club record fee. The acquisition marks a significant investment in strengthening Tottenham's defensive lineup.
content: Tottenham have signed France international Alice Sombath for a club record fee from Lyon.

zh.title: 托特纳姆热刺从里昂签下法国后卫松巴特
zh.summary: 托特纳姆热刺以创俱乐部纪录的转会费从里昂完成了对法国国脚爱丽丝·松巴特的签约。这次收购标志着热刺在加强防线上的重大投资。

title: Podcast: Can Hearts make statement in Europe?
summary: Hearts begin their European campaign as domestic League Cup action heats up. The podcast explores whether the Scottish club can make a meaningful statement on the continental stage.
content: Hearts begin their European journey as League Cup action heats up.

zh.title: 播客:哈茨能否在欧洲做出声明?
zh.summary: 在国内联赛杯比赛升温之际,哈茨开始了他们的欧洲之旅。这期播客探讨了这家苏格兰俱乐部是否能在欧洲舞台上做出有意义的声明。

title: Why World Cup can be game-changer for ambitious MLS
summary: The 2026 World Cup presents a pivotal opportunity for Major League Soccer to establish itself among the world's elite football leagues. Success could accelerate the MLS's growth trajectory and attract increased investment globally.
content: Can the success of the 2026 World Cup help MLS become one of the world's elite leagues?

zh.title: 世界杯如何成为雄心勃勃的美职联的游戏规则改变者
zh.summary: 2026年世界杯为美国职业足球大联盟提供了关键机遇，使其能够在世界顶级足球联赛中确立地位。成功可能会加快美职联的增长轨迹，并吸引更多全球投资。

title: Ipswich open talks for Celtic star Maeda - gossip
summary: Newly-promoted Ipswich are in talks with Celtic to sign forward Maeda, with Scottish champions reportedly targeting an Egypt winger as a potential replacement. The transfer activity reflects Ipswich's ambitions following their return to the Premier League.
content: Newly-promoted Premier League side keen on Celtic forward, with Scottish champions lining up Egypt winger as a possible replacement.

zh.title: 伊普斯维奇与凯尔特人球星前田开启谈判 - 转会传闻
zh.summary: 新晋升的伊普斯维奇正与凯尔特人谈判签约前锋前田，苏格兰冠军队据报道正寻找一名埃及边锋作为潜在替代品。这项转会活动反映了伊普斯维奇重返英超后的雄心。

title: Football Daily
summary: This daily digest covers Spain's recent success, Argentina's controversial performance, and examines whether pressure has eased on manager Thomas Tuchel. The roundup captures key developments from recent international and club football.
content: Spain succeed, Argentina played the villains and is the pressure off Thomas Tuchel?

zh.title: 足球每日播报
zh.summary: 这份每日摘要涵盖了西班牙的最近成就、阿根廷的争议表现，并探讨了主教练托马斯·图赫尔的压力是否有所缓解。综述捕捉了近期国际足球和俱乐部足球的关键发展。

title: Who am I? Guess Premier League star No 1
summary: A daily interactive guessing game where fans attempt to identify a Premier League player in as few attempts as possible. The feature challenges readers' knowledge of current top-flight talent.
content: Work out the identity of today's player in as few attempts as possible.

zh.title: 我是谁？猜英超球星第一号
zh.summary: 一个每日互动猜测游戏，粉丝们尝试以尽可能少的尝试次数识别英超球员。该功能考验读者对顶级联赛球员的了解。

title: Introducing football to the country with one pitch
summary: Nauru, the only nation never to play an official international football match, is developing infrastructure to introduce the sport nationally. The initiative highlights football's continued expansion even in the world's most unlikely regions.
content: Nauru is the only nation to have never played an official international football match and hardly anyone there plays the game. Is that about to change?

zh.title: 用一片球场为国家引入足球
zh.summary: 瑙鲁是唯一从未进行过官方国际足球比赛的国家，目前正在开发基础设施以在全国推广这项运动。该倡议突显了足球即使在世界上最不太可能的地区也在继续扩展。

title: Fake kits worth £18m seized by police during World Cup
summary: UK police seized counterfeit football shirts worth £18 million during the World Cup due to serious safety concerns, with authorities warning the substandard products pose risks to wearers. The operation highlights ongoing efforts to combat fake merchandise in sports.
content: Counterfeit football shirts worth over £18m were seized in the UK during the course of the World Cup because of safety concerns, with the Fire Service warning the outfits can be a danger to those who wear them.

zh.title: 价值1800万英镑的假球衣在世界杯期间被警方没收
zh.summary: 英国警方在世界杯期间没收了价值1800万英镑的假冒足球衫，原因是存在严重的安全隐患，当局警告这些不达标产品对穿着者构成风险。该行动突显了体育界打击假冒商品的持续努力。
